name: REnciv Mod
uniques: [Gold] cost of purchasing items in cities [+100]% <in [non-[Mali]] cities> <if [Musa Pilgrimage] is constructed by anybody> <after founding a religion>
Triggers a [Mansa arrived] event <for [non-[Mali]] Civilizations> <after founding a religion> <if [Musa Pilgrimage] is constructed by anybody>
When defeating a [{T-55} {non-[Captured Tank]} {non-[Rescued Tank]}] unit, earn [75] Gold and recruit it <with [75]% chance> <for [{Major} {non-[Soviet]}] Civilizations>
When defeating a [Captured Tank] unit, earn [125] Gold and recruit it <for [Soviet] Civilizations>
unitUniques: No defensive terrain bonus <for [{Military} {Land} {non-[Romania]}] units> <in [Romania] tiles>
Triggers a [T-55 Capture] event <upon gaining a [T-55] unit> <for [non-[Soviet]] Civilizations> <when number of [Remaining [Soviet] Civilizations] is more than [0]>
Triggers a [T-55 Rescue] event <upon gaining a [T-55] unit> <for [Soviet] Civilizations>
[+15]% Strength <for [10] turns> <upon entering a war with [Lusitanian] Civilizations>
[This Unit] gains [1] XP <in [Unowned] tiles> <within [3] tiles of a [Barbarian encampment]> <upon turn end> <for [{Land} {non-[Siege]}] units> <for [Angola] Civilizations>
